Tanmoy

Projects

ML Inference Platform

Built a high-throughput ML inference platform handling 100M+ requests daily. Optimized for latency and throughput using gRPC and Kubernetes.

Go Kubernetes gRPC

Distributed Data Pipeline

Designed and implemented a fault-tolerant data pipeline using Apache Airflow, Spark, and Kafka for processing terabytes of data daily.

Airflow Spark Kafka

Internal Developer Platform

Created a self-service platform for developers to deploy services, manage configurations, and monitor applications with ease.

Go Kubernetes React

Observability Stack

Implemented comprehensive monitoring, logging, and tracing infrastructure using Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, and Jaeger.

Prometheus Grafana ELK
